name: Skywork Skills
description: Skywork Agent Skills for AI office suites, including AI PPT, AI Document, AI Excel, AI Image, AI Search/DeepResearch and AI Music. These skills can be used by any skills-compatible agent, including Claude Code, Codex CLI and OpenClaw.
review: Six-skill AI office suite with multilingual documentation (EN, ZH, JA, KO). Well-established author with strong community presence. Production-ready with installation instructions for multiple platforms.
